body_txt: Two characters find themselves in a There Is Only One Bed situation. They awake the next morning to discover that at least one, or possibly both of them are clinging to each other in bed. Might involve a case of What Did I Do Last Night? . If at least one of the characters was inebriated it could involve a Bedmate Reveal and/or Alcohol-Induced Bisexuality . It can be particularly embarrassing if one of the parties involved Sleeps in the Nude . Such a character will also often, for comedy purposes, be The Shameless , and ironically be the least concerned about their current situation when they wake up. It might also serve as a dose of Ho Yay . May overlap with Sleep Cute . It can result in a degree of Ship Tease , as well. This is particularly true if one party had climbed into bed with the intent of having the other person cling to them. However, it can also serve as Non-Sexual Intimacy . Usually happens to couples, or possible couples, but non-romantic versions also exist, particularly with a Cuddle Bug . May or may not be Played for Laughs if the characters hate each other in their waking lives or present a tough persona that would not allow cuddling. Compare Fright-Induced Bunkmate , where the clingy character is scared and seeking a sense of security. The Slapstick variant is Sleep Squashing , where a smaller character gets Squashed Flat by the bigger one. Compare Suggestive Collision and Accidental Kiss . Sub-Trope of Accidental Hug .
